reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiekp6VFV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Quiero agradecer a Gladys , de YPF , ACA , Río Tala , por guardar la mochila con mis documentos, mí celular, mí billetera , mis anteojos  , y ponerla a resguardo del personal de esta sucursal a la entrada de San Pedro ...dónde paramos para ir al baño , camino a Córdoba y la dejé olvidada.. Nos pasan muchas cosas no gratas , pero saber que existen personas como Gladys , Jessica , Dalimea y Martín Díaz , reconforta y emociona. Gracias otra vez , y a partir de este dia , esta sucursal de YPF/ ACA , pasa a ser un lugar especial para mí. Espero así lo sea , para todos ,todas , quienes pasen por allí.

(Translated by Google)
I want to thank Gladys from the YPF/ACA station in Río Tala for keeping my backpack safe with my documents, cell phone, wallet, and glasses. She kept it in the care of the staff at this branch at the entrance to San Pedro, where we stopped to use the restroom on our way to Córdoba, and I had forgotten it. Many unpleasant things happen to us, but knowing that people like Gladys, Jessica, Dalimea, and Martín Díaz exist is comforting and touching. Thank you again, and from this day forward, this YPF/ACA branch will be a special place for me. I hope it will be for everyone who passes through.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario, lo esperamos nuevamente

reviews.comment:
Volvíamos de bs as 21:30 .... 28 /06/2024, paramos a comer un sándwich y seguir, COCINA CERRADA , A LAS 22 HS CERRAMOS,  una falta de respeto..   no se quejen si se quedan sin laburo, yo pase y quise consumir, me echaron

(Translated by Google)
We were returning from Buenos Aires at 9:30 p.m. .... 06/28/2024, we stopped to eat a sandwich and continue, KITCHEN CLOSED, AT 10 PM WE CLOSE, a lack of respect... don't complain if you lose your job, I passed by and wanted to consume, they kicked me out

reviews.comment:
Es mi parada obligada, necesitaba un trámite administrativo como socio del ACÁ  y me dio mucho gusto encontrar a Martin Díaz quien fue el que trabajaba en la Oficina de San Nicolás y siempre se ocupó de los socios.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop for me; I needed an administrative procedure as a member of the ACA and I was very pleased to find Martin Díaz, who worked in the San Nicolás office and always took care of the members.
